meaning: adj.会破的,易碎的n.易破的东西,易碎的东西,质脆物品
examples: They were made from hard plastics and that's why they were very breakable.
Don't try this indoors or with something breakable!
So carefully, as if handling something breakable, she rolled El Lobo onto his good side.
If you bumped it up to 125 microns an easily breakable sphere would be yours in about 24 hours.
